items.reviewerNotes: use same image asset as 789
Source asks which papers the driver must carry, but options do not include the q0379/q0517 driver-license answer; no visible answer key. Keep for human QC.
No exact master qid for general no U-turn/opposite-direction travel on a highway; q0010 is ramp-only and q0297 is a penalty-points statement.
No exact master qid found for hail-covered road stability and sharp-braking skid risk; source answer is A/Yes.
Source is a warning sign asking its meaning; top q0785 is a blue mandatory bypass sign, and q0933/q0960 are ROW statements with different answer logic. Treat as new for human duplicate review.
Rejected probation candidate q0252. Source is 12-point license suspension/detention concept, matching q0312; local A yes.
Decision memory indicates consecutive-driving-hours items are not exact matches to q0445 rest-time wording. Source is valid MCQ; create new with local C (8 hours).
Codex low-risk createNewQuestion: No close existing candidate; correct answer is clearly 'réduire la visibilité' (D) for fog. Recommend creating new question with D.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: q0084 matches the assertion that smoking while driving has no impact — that assertion is false. Approve existing qid with answer No (B).

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Source claims police do NOT have right to question drivers who remained but should have left; top candidate q0250 gives similar statement and labels it Wrong. That maps to source option B (No). Slight wording differences lower confidence.

Codex high-risk createNewQuestion: Source correct answer is C (driver has not fastened seatbelt). Similar master q0514 uses a doors-not-closed answer, so no safe existing qid matches this French item's answer semantics. Preserve source screenshot and create as a distinct MCQ for human QC.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Top candidate q0350 ('destroyed' license) is close but source says 'damaged' — legal nuance could differ. Not enough confidence to approve existing qid; needs human/legal check. Rejected top matcher: Top candidate q0350 uses 'destroyed' vs source 'damaged' — potential legal difference, so top match not accepted automatically.

Codex low-risk createNewQuestion: Valid MCQ asking maximum speed through a dangerous curve (explicitly 30 km/h, source option C). No existing candidate clearly matches this exact context (top candidate refers to railway crossing), so create new question and map answer to source C. Rejected top matcher: Top candidate q0382 concerns railway crossing (different context) despite sharing numeric answer; therefore not appropriate to approve.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: No close candidate match found. Source is a valid road-accident rule (mark original position if you moved evidence while assisting); not represented in top candidates — create new question. Local correct option is Yes=A.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Statement 'A driver who breaks a provision of the highway code must be punished' is a valid true/false item but no clear existing candidate match; recommend creating new question with answer A (Yes).

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Specific numeric question about minibus safety distance (<100 km/h → at least 50 m). No existing candidate precisely covers 'minibus <100 km/h' distance; recommend creating new localized item. Source indicates option A (50 m).

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Image shows fuel‑pump/fuel indicator. Source asks if light means add gasoline — a valid ROW (Yes/No) item. No clear existing candidate for fuel indicator in top matches, so create new question; source 'Yes' = A.

Codex low-risk createNewQuestion: Source asks which action to take to avoid a tire puncture; correct meaning is 'check your tires periodically' (French B). Top candidate q0125 is about the wrong measure (mismatch). No existing candidate clearly matches the positive phrasing, so create new. Rejected top matcher: Top candidate q0125 asks for the 'wrong' measure (opposite intent), not the positive action in the source.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Statement 'Snow plows or road maintenance trucks in active operation are given priority' is a valid traffic-safety assertion but no close candidate qid in the shortlist matches this exact rule; recommend creating a new localized question. Answer is 'Yes' (A). Rejected top matcher: Top candidates are snow/icy-driving advice (q0022 etc.) but none explicitly state priority for active snowplows; therefore create new question.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Safe-driving item about encountering a group of schoolchildren — correct behaviour 'ralentir et passer à vitesse réduite' matches source option C. No strong matching existing qid in shortlist; create new localized question.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Source asks which yields 6 penalty points; candidate matches are inconsistent (different option orders/translations). To avoid mapping errors, create new. Based on source options, illegal occupation of emergency lane (D) is the intended answer.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: No candidate in shortlist exactly addresses 'hitting monuments or public installations' obligation to stop/report; source correct answer is 'No' (B). Create new localized question as no clear existing qid matches. Rejected top matcher: Top candidates were not about responsibility after hitting public installations; none matched semantics closely enough to reuse.
Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Text matches q0224: during deferred license checking/renewal period, the holder must not drive. French A=Yes matches q0224 Right.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Prompt and options match q0123: on narrow/dangerous roads you should reduce speed or stop and yield. Source option D corresponds to the same instruction.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Source states a 6-point penalty for reversing/going wrong way/U-turn on highway. Top candidate (q0297) is similar but several candidate signals conflict (master marks Wrong). Legal/point mapping unclear from candidates — require human verification of correct penalty.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Green rectangular sign with 'G15' likely indicates a highway/route number or beginning of a highway section, but candidate matches disagree on exact meaning and option ordering. Cannot confidently assign existing qid or localized correct letter. Rejected top matcher: Top matcher q0799 suggests 'highway beginning' but mapping to localized options is unclear and agreement is low.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Question about whether an end-of-life vehicle, after full repair, may be used is a regulatory/legal item not matched by top candidates. The likely correct answer is 'No' (French option B), but existing qids don't represent this exact rule — create new localized question and human-verify.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Statement that a vehicle deemed unusable under national regulation cannot be registered is a specific legal assertion not covered by candidate items. Recommend creating a new question; source answer appears to be Yes (French option A).

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Statement about street racing and '<3 years' prison has nearby candidate q0275 but top candidate labels disagree and legal penalty phrasing is ambiguous in this localization—insufficient high-confidence match.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Legal-statement item about sentencing (3–7 years) after fleeing and victims dying. Top candidates differ and legal specifics are unclear from source alone; insufficient confidence to approve an existing qid mapping. Rejected top matcher: Top matcher (q0196) asserts 'Wrong' but legal wording and applicability uncertain; do not accept automatic mapping.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Statement about opening doors/boarding while not properly stopped is safety-related but available candidates (e.g., q0320) concern starting with open doors—semantics differ; cannot safely approve mapping.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Statement about reducing speed on a slope to 'maintain driving force' is ambiguous compared to existing items about shifting to lower gear; machine candidates similar but not identical. Needs human/legal/technical verification.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Hard-locked qid q0035 is already present in French production/merged history (translations.fr.json). Do not reuse for this source item without manual duplicate review; previous approved match is withheld for QC.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Hard-locked qid q0004 is already present in French production/merged history (translations.fr.json). Do not reuse for this source item without manual duplicate review; previous approved match is withheld for QC.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Hard-locked qid q0474 is already present in French production/merged history (translations.fr.json). Do not reuse for this source item without manual duplicate review; previous approved match is withheld for QC.

Codex ultra-strict approveExistingQid: MCQ option rows align; French key C (Slow down and let pass) maps to master C (reduce speed and yield). Prompt and option-row concepts were checked against qbank; answer key follows French order.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Hard-locked qid q0758 is already present in French production/merged history (translations.fr.json). Do not reuse for this source item without manual duplicate review; previous approved match is withheld for QC.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Legal nuance unclear: candidates disagree whether police may order drivers to leave/evacuate after property-damage collisions. Insufficient evidence to map to an existing qid or to choose True/False. Rejected top matcher: Top candidate (q0250) asserts police cannot order leave; conflicting candidates and legal nuance make automatic acceptance unsafe.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Potential new question but local answer key is unknown; kept unresolved for human review. Rejected top matcher: Potential new question but local answer key is unknown; kept unresolved for human review.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Potential new question but local answer key is unknown; kept unresolved for human review. Rejected top matcher: Potential new question but local answer key is unknown; kept unresolved for human review.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Hard-locked qid q0117 is already present in French production/merged history (translations.fr.json). Do not reuse for this source item without manual duplicate review; previous approved match is withheld for QC.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Hard-locked qid q0118 is already present in French production/merged history (translations.fr.json). Do not reuse for this source item without manual duplicate review; previous approved match is withheld for QC.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Prompt asks when hazard warning lights may be used. Options include 'traffic jam' and 'follow preceding vehicles' which are ambiguous across jurisdictions; no clear matching qid in candidates. Keep unresolved until legal/local guideline confirmed (likely only for breakdown/emergency).

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Potential match q0120 is now hard-locked in French production/merged history (translations.fr.json; batches 001-016 merged). Source/candidate evidence is not strong enough for duplicate override; kept unresolved for manual QC.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Road marking photo is ambiguous (multiple painted arrows, one crossed). Candidates disagree on which movement is forbidden. Needs human verification of the exact painted symbols.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Image shows an intersection with lights/crosswalk; source asks if right turn is permitted but visual semantics (signal aspect, signage, pedestrians) are ambiguous. Top machine candidate (q0194) is about speeding through an intersection and is not a semantic match. Rejected top matcher: Top matcher q0194 prompt ('may speed up to go through the intersection') is unrelated to the source question about turning right.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Soft-locked qid q0446 was already selected for 018 screenshots/Screenshot 2026-05-08 at 21.45.13.png. Avoiding duplicate qid reuse; manual QC should decide whether this is duplicate coverage, a distinct new question, or a justified override.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Source asks about politely letting vehicles merge into congested traffic. Rejected q0970 because it asks about being overtaken and keeping horizontal distance; potential q0135 is hard-locked and concerns borrowing an opposite lane, not this merge scenario. Kept unresolved rather than forcing a broad traffic-courtesy match.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Placement distance and direction for warning triangle on motorway has conflicting candidate guidance (behind vehicle, in-coming direction, opposite lane); source specifies 'opposite lane' creating mismatch — cannot safely map to existing qid.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Source prompt/wording is ambiguous in French (difference between 'acte de contravention' vs 'acte d'infraction'); top automated candidates do not provide a clear exact match (low scores, semantically related but not identical). Cannot confidently map to an existing qid or accept extracted key A.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Yellow triangular sign shows car over water (submersible/flooded). OCR/extracted correct = A 'tronson submersible' but top machine candidate q0733 = 'slippery section' (mismatch). Other candidates (e.g. 'flooded road') exist but option-letter mappings differ. Ambiguous candidate alignment — leave unresolved for human review.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Source asks about overtaking on mountain road (choose a gentle descent). Top candidate q0172's correct option refers to a wide gentle uphill section — option sets differ; create new item to preserve localized wording.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Image shows a circled continuous white line but candidate q0833 (double broken lines = slowdown/yield) is similar yet option set does not include 'slowdown/yield'. None of the provided French options clearly map to the top candidate; visual/option mismatch — needs human review. Rejected top matcher: Top candidate q0833's meaning (slowdown/yield) does not match any of the source options; option-set / image semantics mismatch.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Red dashboard circle with exclamation matches handbrake/parking-brake indicator. q0534 states it lights when handbrake is pulled up. Source answer 'Yes' corresponds to option A. Rejected top matcher: Top machine match q0571 referenced seatbelt light; selected q0534 explicitly matches handbrake semantics and the visual red circle+exclamation.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Source asks what to do when meeting at an improper place to pass; meaning matches q0170 (reduce speed / stop and yield). French source correct choice is 'ralentir ou s'arrêter et laisser passer' (option B) which maps to master correct behavior.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: No image provided and options are generic sign-type categories. Candidate matches point to directional/prohibitory/indicative/warning but without the sign visual it's ambiguous — cannot safely map to an existing qid.

Codex high-risk createNewQuestion: Red circular sign with black car + diagonal slash supports the source answer concept C ('tout type de véhicule' / motor vehicles prohibited), but source answer highlighting was not extracted. Rejected q0881 because its option rows expect sedan/all kinds/midsize bus/small truck and the master answer is sedan, not this French option set. Manual QC should verify the inferred key C.
